message.content:
@startuml
participant "Pengguna" as User
participant "Login" as Login
participant "LupaPassword" as LupaPassword
participant "ResetPassword" as ResetPassword
participant "DataUser" as DataUser

User -> Login : btnLupaPassword.setOnClickListener()
Login -> LupaPassword : intent(this, LupaPassword.class)
LupaPassword -> LupaPassword : onCreate()
LupaPassword -> User : Menampilkan Form Reset Password
User -> LupaPassword : btnReset.setOnClickListener()
LupaPassword -> ResetPassword : getEmail()
ResetPassword -> DataUser : setNewPassword()
DataUser -> ResetPassword : Berhasil Mereset Password
ResetPassword -> LupaPassword : Berhasil Mereset Password
ResetPassword -> Login : intent(this, LoginActivity.class)
Login -> User : Menampilkan Feedback Untuk Memeriksa Email
@enduml
